blended.narrative: Willamette Pass is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 19".
